option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="24dp" android:background="@color/background">
<!-- Verification Icon --> <TextView android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:text="@string/verify_check" android:textSize="48sp" android:textColor="@color/success" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/circle_background" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/email_verification" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Description --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/verification_sent" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" />
<!-- Email --> <TextView android:id="@+id/email_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/example_email" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" />
<!-- Continue Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/continue_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/continue_button" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Resend Link --> <TextView android:id="@+id/resend_link" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/resend_confirmation" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:gravity="center" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/primary">
<!-- Header with Timer and Score --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Button android:id="@+id/quit_button" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/close_symbol" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/game_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/korak_po_korak" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:gravity="center" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="end">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/time_label" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/time_70s" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Game Content --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Step Number --> <TextView android:id="@+id/step_number" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/step_initial" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Hint Display --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/background" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/hint" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/hint_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/hint_placeholder" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" />
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Guess Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/guess_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/enter_guess" android:inputType="text" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Submit Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/submit_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/submit" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:backgroundTint="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Pass Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/pass_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/pass" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Score Display --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:background="@color/primary_dark">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/score_label" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/score_value" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/score_zero" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/warning" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<!-- Logo/Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="32sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" />
<!-- Login Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/login" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Email/Username Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/email_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/email" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Password Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/password_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/password" android:inputType="textPassword" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Forgot Password Link --> <TextView android:id="@+id/forgot_password" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/forgot_password" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" />
<!-- Login Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/login_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/login_button" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Separator --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginVertical="16dp">
<View android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@color/divider" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/dont_have_account" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" android:paddingHorizontal="8dp" />
<View android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@color/divider" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Register Link --> <TextView android:id="@+id/register_link" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/register_button" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textStyle="bold" android:gravity="center" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/primary">
<!-- Header with Timer and Score --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Button android:id="@+id/quit_button" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/close_symbol" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/game_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/moj_broj" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:gravity="center" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="end">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/time_label" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/time_60s" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Game Content --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Target Number --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp" android:background="@color/background" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/target_number" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/target_number" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/target_number_value_sample" android:textSize="32sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:gravity="center" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Given Numbers --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/given_numbers" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/sample_numbers" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<GridLayout android:id="@+id/numbers_grid" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:columnCount="6" android:rowCount="1" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/number_25" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/number_50" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/number_3" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/number_7" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/number_2" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/number_9" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
</GridLayout>
<!-- Operators --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/operators_label" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<GridLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:columnCount="3" android:rowCount="2" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/op_paren_open" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/op_paren_close" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/op_plus" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/op_minus" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/op_mul" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:text="@string/op_div" android:textSize="20sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" android:layout_margin="4dp" />
</GridLayout>
<!-- Expression Display --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/expression_label" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/expression_display" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/expr_placeholder" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@drawable/edit_text_background" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" />
<!-- Result Display --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/result" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/result_display" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/result_placeholder" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@drawable/edit_text_background" android:padding="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" />
<!-- Submit Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/submit_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/submit" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:backgroundTint="@color/background_light" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
<!-- Score Display --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:background="@color/primary_dark">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/score_label" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/score_value" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/score_zero" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/warning" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/background">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Button android:id="@+id/back_button" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/back_arrow" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/notifications" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:paddingStart="16dp" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Filter Buttons --> <HorizontalScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:scrollbars="none" android:padding="8dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Button android:id="@+id/filter_all" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/all" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/filter_chat" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/chat" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/filter_ranking" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/ranking" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/filter_rewards" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/rewards" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/filter_read" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/filter_read" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/background" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" />
</LinearLayout>
</HorizontalScrollView>
<!-- Send test notification button --> <Button android:id="@+id/send_test_notification" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:text="@string/send_test_notification_button" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary" android:textColor="@color/white" />
<!-- Notifications List --> <ListView android:id="@+id/notifications_list" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:divider="@color/divider" android:dividerHeight="1dp" />
<!-- Empty State --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/empty_state" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/no_notifications" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<!-- Back Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/back_button" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/back_arrow" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/reset_password" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<!-- Description --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/reset_description" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Old Password Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/old_password_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/old_password" android:inputType="textPassword" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- New Password Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/new_password_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/new_password" android:inputType="textPassword" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Confirm New Password Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/confirm_new_password_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/confirm_new_password" android:inputType="textPassword" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Reset Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/reset_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/reset_button" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<!-- Back Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/back_button" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/back_arrow" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Register Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/register" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<!-- Email Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/email_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/email" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Username Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/username_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/username" android:inputType="text" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Region Spinner --> <Spinner android:id="@+id/region_spinner" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Password Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/password_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/password" android:inputType="textPassword" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Confirm Password Input --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:passwordToggleEnabled="true" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/confirm_password_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/confirm_password" android:inputType="textPassword" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Register Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/register_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/register_button" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/primary">
<!-- Header with Timer and Attempts --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Button android:id="@+id/quit_button" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="✕" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/game_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/skocko" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:gravity="center" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="end">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Vreme:" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="30s" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Game Content --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Attempt Info --> <TextView android:id="@+id/attempt_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/attempt_initial" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Target Pattern --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/background">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Zadata kombinacija" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/target_pattern" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/skocko_placeholder" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@android:drawable/btn_default" />
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/skocko_placeholder" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@android:drawable/btn_default" />
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/skocko_placeholder" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@android:drawable/btn_default" />
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/skocko_placeholder" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@android:drawable/btn_default" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Symbol Grid --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Simboli" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<GridLayout android:id="@+id/symbols_grid" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:columnCount="3" android:rowCount="2" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="★" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="●" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="◆" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="♥" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="▲" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="☼" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
</GridLayout>
<!-- Guess History --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Pokušaji" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="1. pokušaj" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="2. pokušaj" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="3. pokušaj" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="4. pokušaj" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="5. pokušaj" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="6. pokušaj" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Action Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/submit_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/submit" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:backgroundTint="@color/background_light" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/primary">
<!-- Header with Timer and Attempts --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Button android:id="@+id/quit_button" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/close_symbol" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/game_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/skocko" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:gravity="center" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="end">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/time_label" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/timer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/time_30s" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Game Content --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:padding="16dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Attempt Info --> <TextView android:id="@+id/attempt_text" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/attempt_initial" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<!-- Target Pattern --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/background">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/skocko_target_label" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/target_pattern" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/skocko_placeholder" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@android:drawable/btn_default" />
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/skocko_placeholder" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@android:drawable/btn_default" />
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/skocko_placeholder" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@android:drawable/btn_default" />
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_margin="4dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/skocko_placeholder" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:background="@android:drawable/btn_default" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Symbol Grid --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/skocko_symbols" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<GridLayout android:id="@+id/symbols_grid" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:columnCount="3" android:rowCount="2" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="@string/symbol_star" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="@string/symbol_circle" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="@string/symbol_diamond" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="@string/symbol_heart" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="@string/symbol_triangle" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
<Button android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_columnWeight="1" android:layout_margin="6dp" android:text="@string/symbol_sun" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/primary_dark" />
</GridLayout>
<!-- Guess History --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/attempts_label" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/background_light" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/attempt_row_1" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="@string/attempt_1" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/attempt_row_2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="@string/attempt_2" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/attempt_row_3" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="@string/attempt_3" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/attempt_row_4" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="@string/attempt_4" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/attempt_row_5" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="@string/attempt_5" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/attempt_row_6" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:text="@string/attempt_6" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:background="@color/background" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Action Button --> <Button android:id="@+id/submit_button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:text="@string/submit" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:backgroundTint="@color/background_light" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:background="@color/primary_dark">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/score_label" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/score_value" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/score_zero" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/warning" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" />
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color>
<!-- Primary Colors --> <color name="primary">#6C63FF</color> <color name="primary_light">#8A84FF</color> <color name="primary_dark">#5A52CC</color>
<!-- Accent Colors --> <color name="accent">#FF6B6B</color> <color name="success">#51CF66</color> <color name="warning">#FFD93D</color> <color name="error">#FF6B6B</color>
<!-- Neutral Colors --> <color name="text_primary">#2C3E50</color> <color name="text_secondary">#7F8C8D</color> <color name="background_light">#F5F7FA</color> <color name="background">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="divider">#E0E0E0</color>
<!-- League Colors --> <color name="league_gold">#FFD700</color> <color name="league_silver">#C0C0C0</color> <color name="league_bronze">#CD7F32</color> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Slagalica Quiz</string>
<!-- Login/Registration --> <string name="login">Prijava</string> <string name="register">Registracija</string> <string name="email">Email</string> <string name="username">Korisničko ime</string> <string name="password">Lozinka</string> <string name="confirm_password">Potvrdi lozinku</string> <string name="region">Region</string> <string name="forgot_password">Zaboravljena lozinka?</string> <string name="reset_password">Resetuj lozinku</string> <string name="old_password">Stara lozinka</string> <string name="new_password">Nova lozinka</string> <string name="confirm_new_password">Potvrdi novu lozinku</string> <string name="login_button">Prijavi se</string> <string name="register_button">Registruj se</string> <string name="reset_button">Resetuj</string> <string name="already_have_account">Već imaš nalog?</string> <string name="dont_have_account">Nemaš nalog?</string> <string name="email_verification">Email potvrda</string> <string name="verify_email">Potvrdi email</string> <string name="verification_sent">Potvrda je poslata na tvoj email</string>
<!-- Notifications --> <string name="notifications">Notifikacije</string> <string name="no_notifications">Nema notifikacija</string> <string name="mark_as_read">Označi kao pročitano</string> <string name="mark_as_unread">Označi kao nepročitano</string> <string name="filter_read">Pročitane</string> <string name="filter_unread">Nepročitane</string> <string name="all">Sve</string> <string name="chat_notifications">Poruke u četu</string> <string name="ranking_notifications">Rangiranje</string> <string name="reward_notifications">Nagrade</string> <string name="other_notifications">Ostalo</string>
<!-- Games --> <string name="korak_po_korak">Korak po korak</string> <string name="moj_broj">Moj broj</string> <string name="skocko">Skočko</string> <string name="guess">Pogađaj</string> <string name="submit">Pošalji</string> <string name="time_remaining">Preostalo vreme: %d s</string> <string name="score">Poeni: %d</string> <string name="attempt">Pokušaj %d / 6</string> <string name="score_label">Poeni:</string> <string name="step_initial">Korak 1</string> <string name="attempt_initial">Pokušaj 1 / 6</string> <string name="target_number">Traženi broj</string> <string name="given_numbers">Dati brojevi</string> <string name="result">Rezultat</string> <string name="congratulations">Čestitam!</string> <string name="game_over">Igra je gotova</string> <string name="step">Korak %d</string> <string name="hint">Nagoveštaj</string> <string name="skocko_placeholder">•</string> <string name="test_notification_title">Test notifikacija</string> <string name="test_notification_message">Ovo je probna notifikacija prikazana u KT1 tabeli notifikacija.</string> <string name="test_notification_time">Sada</string> <string name="notif_permission_missing">Dozvola za notifikacije nedostaje</string> <string name="notif_test_sent">Test notifikacija poslata</string> <string name="notif_permission_denied">Dozvola za notifikacije nije data</string> <string name="notif_channel_name">Sistemske notifikacije</string> <string name="notif_channel_description">Kanal za testne notifikacije iz aplikacije</string> <!-- Strings moved from layouts to remove hardcoded text warnings --> <string name="close_symbol">✕</string> <string name="time_label">Vreme:</string> <string name="time_30s">30s</string> <string name="time_70s">70s</string> <string name="time_60s">60s</string> <string name="skocko_target_label">Zadata kombinacija</string> <string name="skocko_symbols">Simboli</string> <string name="symbol_star">★</string> <string name="symbol_circle">●</string> <string name="symbol_diamond">◆</string> <string name="symbol_heart">♥</string> <string name="symbol_triangle">▲</string> <string name="symbol_sun">☼</string> <string name="attempts_label">Pokušaji</string> <string name="attempt_1">1. pokušaj</string> <string name="attempt_2">2. pokušaj</string> <string name="attempt_3">3. pokušaj</string> <string name="attempt_4">4. pokušaj</string> <string name="attempt_5">5. pokušaj</string> <string name="attempt_6">6. pokušaj</string> <string name="pass">Preskoči</string> <string name="enter_guess">Unesite pojam</string> <string name="hint_placeholder">Ovde se prikazuje nagoveštaj</string> <string name="operators_label">Operatori</string> <string name="expression_label">Izraz</string> <string name="expr_placeholder">Vaš izraz se prikazuje ovde</string> <string name="result_placeholder">Rezultat</string> <string name="score_zero">0</string>
